desc.id: Halaman khusus bagi investor nasional dan internasional yang ingin memahami profil bisnis, potensi pertumbuhan, dan komitmen ESG PT Bikin Orang Bahagia.
desc.en: A dedicated page for national and international investors who want to understand PT Bikin Orang Bahagia's business profile, growth potential, and ESG commitment.

sub.id: BOBA Agro · BOBA Global · BOBA Nusantara
sub.en: BOBA Agro · BOBA Global · BOBA Nusantara

subtitle.id: PT BOBA adalah perusahaan multi-sektor yang menggabungkan industri tekstil, fashion brand, dan layanan green technology dalam satu ekosistem terintegrasi.
subtitle.en: PT BOBA is a multi-sector company combining the textile industry, fashion brands, and green technology services in one integrated ecosystem.

desc.id: Tiga brand kuat di sektor berbeda meminimalkan risiko konsentrasi bisnis.
desc.en: Three strong brands in different sectors minimize business concentration risk.

desc.id: Ekspansi cepat jaringan distribusi bahan baku alam ke seluruh Indonesia dan pasar ekspor.
desc.en: Rapid expansion of natural raw material distribution networks across Indonesia and export markets.

desc.id: Komitmen perdagangan bahan baku alam yang berkelanjutan sesuai standar ESG global.
desc.en: Commitment to sustainable natural raw material trading in line with global ESG standards.

desc.id: Pendiri berpengalaman dengan fokus pertumbuhan jangka panjang dan transparan.
desc.en: Experienced founding team focused on long-term and transparent growth.

sub.id: BOBA Agro · BOBA Global · BOBA Nusantara

desc.id: PT Bikin Orang Bahagia resmi didirikan dengan visi industri tekstil, fashion, dan green technology.
desc.en: PT Bikin Orang Bahagia officially founded with a vision in textile industry, fashion, and green technology.

title.id: Peluncuran Unit BOBA Agro & BOBA Nusantara
title.en: Launch of BOBA Agro & BOBA Nusantara Units

desc.id: Unit perdagangan komoditas pertanian dan distribusi nasional resmi beroperasi.
desc.en: Agricultural commodity trading and national distribution units officially start operations.

desc.id: Unit ekspor internasional BOBA Global resmi beroperasi, membuka akses pasar global untuk komoditas alam Indonesia.
desc.en: BOBA Global international export unit officially starts operations, opening global market access for Indonesian natural commodities.

desc.id: PT BOBA meluncurkan marketplace digital terintegrasi untuk produk fashion dan layanan green technology.
desc.en: PT BOBA launches an integrated digital marketplace for fashion products and green technology services.

desc.id: Rencana ekspansi ke pasar Asia Tenggara dan kerja sama investor strategis nasional/internasional.
desc.en: Plans for expansion into Southeast Asian markets and strategic national/international investor partnerships.

subtitle.id: Kami terbuka untuk diskusi serius tentang investasi, kemitraan strategis, dan kerja sama jangka panjang.
subtitle.en: We are open for serious discussions on investment, strategic partnerships, and long-term cooperation.

commitment.id: Tim Investor Relations PT BOBA akan menghubungi Anda kembali dalam 2×24 jam kerja untuk mendiskusikan peluang investasi lebih lanjut.
commitment.en: The PT BOBA Investor Relations team will contact you within 2 business days to discuss investment opportunities further.

successDesc.id: Terima kasih atas minat Anda. Tim Investor Relations PT BOBA akan menghubungi Anda dalam 2×24 jam kerja.
successDesc.en: Thank you for your interest. The PT BOBA Investor Relations team will contact you within 2 business days.

privacyNote.id: Dengan mengirim inquiry, Anda menyetujui Kebijakan Privasi PT BOBA.
privacyNote.en: By sending an inquiry, you agree to PT BOBA's Privacy Policy.
